title: Thendrale Thendrale Lyrics Kadhal Desam
stanzas:
Thendrale thendrale
mella nee veesu.
poovudun mella
nee paesu. (2)

karaiyin madiyil
nadhiyum thoongum
kavalai marandhu thoongu.

iravin madiyil
ulagam thoongum
iniya kanavil thoongu.

Thendrale thendrale
mella nee veesu.
poovudun mella
nee paesu.

kadhal endraal kavalaiya
kannil neerin thivalaiyaa
noiyaanen uyirum neeyaanen

iravil kaayum muzhu nila
enakku mattum sudum nila
vaaraayo enai ne seraayo

thoonga vaikkum nilave
thookkamindri neeye
vaadinaayo

Thendrale thendrale
mella nee veesu.
poovudun mella
nee paesu

maalai vaanil
kathirum saayum
madiyil saaindhu thoongada
boomi yaaum
thoongum podhu
poovai neeyum thoongada

malarin kaadhal
panikku theriyum
en manadhil
kadhal theriyumaa

solla vaarthai kodithaan
unai neril kandaal
mounam yaen
thoonga vaikka paadien
naan thookkamindri
vaadinen.

Thendrale thendrale
mella nee veesu.
poovudun mella
nee paesu (2)

karaiyin madiyil
nadhiyum thoongum
kavalai marandhu thoongu.

iravin madiyil
ulagam thoongum
iniya kanavil thoongu.

Thendrale thendrale
mella nee veesu.
poovudun mella
nee paesu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thendrale Thendrale'?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings, portraying a dreamy dialogue between lovers.

In which movie is 'Thendrale Thendrale' featured?

'Thendrale Thendrale' is featured in the movie Kadhal Desam.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Mano and Unnikrishnan.

Who composed the music for 'Thendrale Thendrale'?

The music for this song was composed by A.R. Rahman.

When was 'Thendrale Thendrale' released?

The song was released on August 23, 1996.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thendrale Thendrale, the characters express their love through poetic lyrics and soothing melodies, perfectly encapsulating the essence of romance. The song plays a pivotal role in Kadhal Desam, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative. With its gentle rhythm and heartfelt delivery, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and longing. This timeless piece remains a favorite among fans, celebrating the beauty of love and connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thendrale Thendrale from Kadhal Desam is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of Mano and Unnikrishnan, this song transports listeners to a dreamy world of love and longing. A.R. Rahman's magical composition elevates the experience, making it a timeless classic that resonates with hearts across generations.
stanzaMeanings: Gentle breeze, gently blow. Speak softly like a flower.
In the shade of the shore, the river sleeps, forgetting its worries and resting.
In the embrace of dreams, the world sleeps, resting in sweet dreams.
Gentle breeze, gently blow. Speak softly like a flower.
If love brings worry, then tears are the pain in my eyes; I am your life.
Will the full moon that shines in the night come only for me? Will you come to me?
Will you call me without sleep, oh moon that puts others to sleep?
Gentle breeze, gently blow. Speak softly like a flower.
When the evening sky is filled with light, the earth will also sleep; will you not sleep like a flower?
The love of the flower knows the pain of love; does my heart know love?
When I see you, I forget my silence; why should I sing without sleep? I have sung without rest.
Gentle breeze, gently blow. Speak softly like a flower.
In the shade of the shore, the river sleeps, forgetting its worries and resting.
In the embrace of dreams, the world sleeps, resting in sweet dreams.
Gentle breeze, gently blow. Speak softly like a flower.
